TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType tag packed into a 32-bit unsigned integer.

Docs.param: The raw 32-bit packed tag value, with the first character in the high byte.

Docs.param: The string to parse. Strings shorter than four characters are right-padded with spaces. or empty strings return a tag with value 0.
Docs.summary: Parses a string of up to four ASCII characters into an .
Docs.returns: An corresponding to the specified string.

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
